title: Costs
description: Inference spend, platform fees, credits, and live quota windows.
selectCompany: Select a company to view costs.
selectDates: Select a start and end date to load data.

budget.controlPlaneDescription: Hard-stop spend limits for agents and projects. Provider subscription quota stays separate and appears under Providers.
budget.activeIncidentsSubtitle: Open soft or hard threshold crossings
budget.pendingApprovalsSubtitle: Budget override approvals awaiting board action
budget.activeIncidentsDescription: Resolve hard stops here by raising the budget or explicitly keeping the scope paused.
budget.agentBudgetsDescription: Recurring monthly spend policies for individual agents.
budget.projectBudgetsDescription: Lifetime spend policies for execution-bound projects.
budget.noPolicies: No budget policies yet. Set agent and project budgets from their detail pages, or use the existing company monthly budget control.

inference.ledgerDescription: Request-scoped inference spend for the selected period.
inference.percentConsumed: {{percent}}% of monthly budget consumed in this range.

finance.ledgerDescription: Account-level charges that do not map to a single inference request.
finance.netSubtitle: Debit minus credit for the selected period
finance.estimatedSubtitle: Estimated debits that are not yet invoice-authoritative
finance.byBillerDescription: Account-level financial events grouped by who charged or credited them.
finance.noEvents: No finance events yet. Add account-level charges once biller invoices or credits land.

byAgent.title: By agent
byAgent.description: What each agent consumed in the selected period.

byProject.title: By project
byProject.description: Run costs attributed through project-linked issues.

providers.noEvents: No cost events in this period.
providers.noBillableEvents: No billable events in this period.
